race.comment: OVER YONDER (2) has been threatening a win in stronger company. Hasn't had the best of it the last couple and the 2kg claim helps with some of the weight increase. Maps for a soft run and gets his chance. HEART OF THE MED (10) looked sharp at the trials before delivering a 3.7L win at Murray Bridge on debut. Tracked the speed and is likely to skip over and do the same. She's promising and is capable of taking the next step. LIKE A DRIFTER (5) resumed on the same day and was backed off the map leading and winning a Maiden by 4L. He'd just missed at a short quote here prior but has a wide barrier to contend with today. Keep the handy 2kg claim and is sure to feature with some luck. JUSTACCLAIM (4) resumes off an easy Maiden win at Murray Bridge on debut. He's trialled well and will be naturally improved. Should find a forward position and is in the mix.
